headline: Nike Restructuring And China Pressures Test New CEO Turnaround Plan
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) is reportedly preparing a major restructuring as it contends with weak consumer demand and high inventory levels. Distributors in China, including Pou Sheng, have issued profit warnings that highlight pressure on Nike’s China business. The company has rescheduled its earnings report, which has raised expectations of substantial corporate changes. New CEO Elliott Hill is rolling out a turnaround plan focused on reviving growth and rebuilding wholesale partnerships. Nike is a...
